name: Kirby
description: HAL Laboratory and Nintendo's accessible action-platforming franchise starring Kirby and his copy abilities.

eras.title: Sakurai Era
eras.description: Original Kirby identity, copy abilities, Super Star structure, and early experiments.

eras.title: Modern HAL Era
eras.description: Return to polished 2D platforming and expanded copy-ability design.

eras.title: 3D Era
eras.description: Full 3D mainline Kirby beginning with Forgotten Land.
